items.title: Non-developer builds Next.js + Supabase SaaS with Claude Code, makes $4k in 2 months
items.why_it_matters: A non-technical product marketer used Claude Code to build a Next.js, Supabase, and Vercel project tracking tool that is now used by 45 active users and has generated $4,000. It is direct proof that your exact stack, driven entirely by Claude, is more than enough to ship a revenue-generating product. This week, open Claude Code and ask it to scaffold a basic user feedback widget for your AI-ingest project so you can start collecting user data the moment you deploy.

items.title: Anthropic pauses separate billing changes for Claude Code
items.why_it_matters: Anthropic has paused its plan to move Claude Code and the Agent SDK to a dedicated paid credit system, meaning your usage will continue to be covered under your standard Claude subscription limits for now. This keeps your development costs at zero extra dollars while you build. Take advantage of this window this week by running a heavy, multi-file refactoring session with Claude Code to clean up your Git repository's structure.

items.title: Veterinarian builds and launches AI lawn diagnosis tool
items.why_it_matters: A founder with zero tech background built GrassDX, a simple web app where users upload a photo of their lawn and enter a ZIP code to get an instant AI diagnosis. It is a great example of a highly focused, single-purpose AI wrapper that solves a real-world problem without complex architecture. This week, write a simple Next.js API route that takes an image input and passes it to Claude's vision model to return a basic text description, proving to yourself how easy it is to handle media uploads.
